components.button_primary: bg-[#2563EB] hover:bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-[12px] px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.button_secondary: bg-blue-50 hover:bg-blue-100 text-[#2563EB] rounded-[12px] px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.input: border border-slate-200 rounded-[12px] px-4 py-2.5 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 outline-none transition-all w-full text-sm
components.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5
components.badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
components.stepper: flex flex-col gap-4 relative before:absolute before:inset-y-0 before:left-[11px] before:w-px before:bg-slate-200

image_urls.description: Abstract tech network background for the landing page hero section.
Professional female headshot for customer/executive profiles.
Professional male headshot for manager/admin profiles.
Smiling customer support agent, ideal for the 'Support Team' section or Auth page sidebars.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` attributes to ALL interactive and key informational elements for robust testing.
Follow the Light Theme exclusively as per user constraints. Do not implement a dark mode.
Ensure clean, simple, and modern SaaS aesthetics (inspired by Linear, Stripe, Notion). Keep tasks within 3-5 clicks.
Use Outfit for headings and Inter for body text to maintain a professional yet approachable tone.
Implement 12px border radius across all cards, dialogs, and inputs. Use extremely soft shadows.
For the real-time AI progress, implement a vertical stepper displaying sequential text updates ('Analyzing...' 'Understanding...' 'Detecting Intent...').

Use Recharts for the Admin Dashboard to visualize 5 charts: Complaint Trend (line), Department Distribution (pie/donut), Priority Distribution (bar), Monthly Complaints (area), and Resolution Time (bar).
Build the Complaint Analysis page heavily utilizing grid layouts (Bento/Control Room) to display Summary, Intent, Entities, Duplicate Score, AI Recommendations, etc. in distinct cards.
Keep animations minimal—use Framer Motion primarily for smooth state transitions (e.g., tabs, modal entry, stepper progress) rather than decorative motion.
Ensure the UI uses .js/.jsx files (not TypeScript) as requested in the workspace setup.
